### QA Test Suite - Manual Test Cases
- **Persona**: MANUAL-QA
- **Requirement**: USER-STORY-FORMAT
- **Operational Domains**: 
#### 🟢 Positive Test Cases (Functional Verification)
- [ ] **TC-POS-1**: Verify rule [BR-001] - "a broken icon will appear - After a chat with Yvonne, we've confirmed Clients ususally provide their own logos, removing a defualt logo will result in a broken icon being shown, however this will only be until the client updates the logo" under condition: "provide default image, as if there is no image present".

#### 🔴 Negative Test Cases (Failure Paths & Exceptions)
- [ ] **TC-NEG-1**: Trigger validation errors by submitting empty or malformed inputs.
- [ ] **TC-NEG-2**: Verify authentication denial / authorization lockout for unauthorized actions.

#### 📐 Boundary & Edge Case Checklist
- [ ] **TC-BND-1**: Assert character limit overflows (e.g., input values at limit, limit + 1).
- [ ] **TC-EDGE-1**: Trigger race conditions or concurrent connection interrupts.

#### ♿ Accessibility & UX Compliance Checks (WCAG)
- [ ] **ACC-1**: Verify keyboard navigation (Tab indices) and focus indicator visibility.
- [ ] **ACC-2**: Assert screen reader accessibility via ARIA labels and semantic markup validation.
